title: cites relation (ONT-R-08)
description: USE FOR: any entity cites Document with locator. The object MUST resolve to a Document entity URI — cites is the cite-as-reference relation whose resolution target is the Document entity referenced by provenance.source.document_id. Distinguished from derived_from: cites = 'this artifact references that document'; derived_from = 'this artifact was DERIVED from that artifact'. Phase 4 demo data uses cites heavily because Document entities are the resolution targets for provenance.source.document_id. Schema version: 0.1.0.

locator.description: Sub-document locator within the cited Document.

quotation.description: Optional. The cited text fragment if direct-quoted.
